embeds.title: Morimens Tier List
embeds.description: General Notes: An attempt was made to order the characters by strength within their individual tiers, but take it with a grain of salt. I don’t think Sorel is actually the worst character in the “Situational” tier, and I gave up entirely on ordering B tier due to the sheer number of characters...

content: there is this from a while ago
it doesnt have tawil but tawil is around the top two tiers anyway
Thais good if you have other decent Awakers, she can't really multi-role like someone like Tawil or Hameln; she's more like Leigh, or Karen, where her entire thing is being a Support
She can make a Caro team explode
like, really pop off and be amazing
But she is as dedicated to full support as it gets, even with her Exalt dealing damage; the damage is just a bonus to the other stuff it does

When the when you when enter event menu the thais thais's the physics
Dies from stroke*
Who does she pair well with? Cause I really really love the designs of the Caro characters I want to try and build a team with them.
Thais is a support for any caro team
I'd personally say go for her if you have and like other Caro DPS, ideally ones that work really hard off of Exalt spam like Uvhash, or even Sorel
You just don't build around her because she's not the focus
Cause her biggest benefit is making good babies and letting you use strong Command Cards more often
I got her, Uvhash, and Leigh from pulling for her. And I have the small child you get from the story too
I'm very tempted to E3 her sig wheels for my caro team/s
I'd say that's a decent team to start off with if you're curious about trying her!
Leigh and Thais will make you lots of babies
Uvhash will _eat_ most of those babies
plus Leigh is good for Caro teams that want to edge their own health bar (like Uvhash does)
Is 3 assist 1 damage fine? Im still in the early chapters (taking my time playing through the story but Im in chapter 2 rn) but team building in games like these is just never my strongsuit lol
3 Assist 1 Damage is fine depending on who your Assists are, and what Realm you're running.
synergy first less worrying about what roles your awakers actually are
Thats fair. Unless I misread, everyone but Uvhash would be an assist.
Caro specifically _likes_ to get hurt sometimes, and their focus on HP manipulation means you can get away with going low
If they work well together then that's the important part
When I first started the game I thought roles meant something. Now ik it means nothing
I mean, they labeled Tawil assist
I should understand that myself. Cause I have Tawil and at times she outdamages just about everyone in my team
Those Wings cards are fucking bonkers.
With Leigh/Uvhash/Aigis/Thais, ideally your game plan would probably be to funnel babies to Uvhash, then use a Thais Baby to Leigh Exalt if you get _too_ low
Cause Uvhash likes to eat as often as he can, and to get as close to 0 as he can
and Leigh will heal you just enough that you never go over the line, in theory
if u play Caro then yes
Aigis doesn't really care abt HP, or preserving it, her Little Wish is a good 1 Arith bonus to help Uvhash do more damage and make babies faster
plus her Exalt is a good 'oh shidd' button once per fight

Ok, Im back with another Caro question. For the team im running (Uvhash, Leigh, Thais, and Faint). Do I just exclusively feed Embryos to Uvhash? Cause if Im reading their Exalts correctly, they get benefits from Devouring. Maybe Im just misplaying but I find myself a bit Embryo starved at times. Unless thats just how its supposed to be. There are times Ill just have Faint or Leighs Exalts ready but no Embryo so it just feels like theres no real benefit to using the Exalt since I wont get the benefits of Devour. If theres a guide for Caro somewhere I can read? Unless Im somehow just overthinking stuff. Like Im not struggling. But Im also over leveled for where Im at. My whole teams level 30 but Im at the tail end of Chapter 2. So Im like 10 or so levels above the recommended level for my Awakeners.
You don't have to exalt with Leigh if you're not needing it
You can just let it cap there
It's emergency healing so you use it when you need it
Thais doesn't need her devour effect
Yeah I figured that for Leigh. I guess itd be the same with Faint too then? Or would I just want the Death Resist +100% either way?
It's cute so you can just ignore it if you want
The big part is still just duping the cards
If you want 100% death res, you could just put a chaos unit in. Start exploration with +100%
The strange thing is that the schoolcat was not so shocked when he saw the picture of him x Goliath and Goliath x him <:laugh:1243502404394160208>
It also only stacks to a certain limit, her gaining death res, then after that you can't get more
So the name of the game is just "feed Uhvash babies so he can deal big damage"?
All Caro awakers benefit from Devour
but for this team, Uvhash who is your DPS, benefits a lot in particular
cause he will kill things faster
but in the end it's a judgement call
Faint's devour is a weakness effect, which is nice but you won't necessarily need to trigger it if your exalt is up when you can already full block or the enemy is already weakened
The card it puts in hand is cool too but again you can get that card another turn when you actually need the weakness effect as well plus the card
